name: Publitio
description: Image and video management API with upload, transformation, streaming, and CDN delivery for media pipelines.

seo.title: Publitio — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Publitio: Image and video management API with upload, transformation, streaming, and CDN delivery for media pipelines.

when_to_use: Image and video upload API with CDN delivery and transforms
Media asset management with URL-based transformations
Video streaming with adaptive bitrate from uploaded files
Replacing S3 plus Cloudinary with an all-in-one media API
Serving optimized media for e-commerce product listings

pros: Handles video and image with same API
review.verdict: Budget Cloudinary alternative — covers the 80% use case at a fraction of the cost.
review.best_for: Small SaaS needing image and video transformation API on a startup budget.
review.not_for: Large-scale apps needing edge caching depth and advanced AI transforms.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
